basic_details.job_title: YIL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The latest Yantra India Limited (YIL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Company Secretary posts! Published on the official YIL website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum age limit of 50 years and possessing Associate/Fellow Membership of ICSI, working knowledge of computers, and a minimum of 5 years post-qualification experience as a Company Secretary in a company registered under the Companies Act can apply through offline mode. Find all details about the YIL Company Secretary new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, appli

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 15 days from the date of publication of Advertisement

qualification.education_qualification: Associate/Fellow Member of ICSI, Working knowledge of computer, Minimum 5 years post qualification experience as Company Secretary in a company registered under Companies Act
qualification.details: Associate/Fellow Member of ICSI Working knowledge of computer Minimum 5 years post qualification experience as Company Secretary in a company registered under Companies Act

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for YIL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:ddpdoo.gov.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
